title: salvia ovalifolia var. ovalifolia
intro: Salvia ovalifolia var. ovalifolia, a variant of the Salvia ovalifolia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sage family, native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Salvia ovalifolia var. ovalifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin care. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat respiratory issues and as a natural remedy for sore throats.
